---
title: "People"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: pi-listing
    contents: "*/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: 350px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    sort: "order"
    include:
      group: "pi"
  - id: grad-listing
    contents: "*/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: 350px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    sort: "order"
    include:
      group: "grad"
  - id: undergrad-listing
    contents: "*/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: 350px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    sort: "order"
    include:
      group: "undergrad"
  - id: alumni-listing
    contents: "*/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: 350px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    sort: "order"
    include:
      group: "alumni"
---

Meet the members of the MARSS Lab.

## Principal Investigator

::: {#pi-listing}
:::

## Graduate Students

::: {#grad-listing}
:::

## Undergraduate Students

::: {#undergrad-listing}
:::

## A Selection of Lab Alumni

::: {#alumni-listing}
:::
